title: Optimize count_primes_up_to
description: Test-only prime counting fixture with deterministic correctness checks and a real benchmark.
baseline_summary: Naive trial division for every candidate integer.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher speedup is better. This task maximizes runtime gain over the checked-in baseline.

prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. Preserve count_primes_up_to(limit) semantics and return the number of primes at or below limit.
